svg.title: Hermite-Gauss eigenfunctions ψ₀ through ψ₃ of the quantum harmonic oscillator
svg.desc: Four stacked panels showing the signed wave functions ψ₀ (Gaussian, 0 nodes), ψ₁ (1 node), ψ₂ (2 nodes), ψ₃ (3 nodes), each with classical turning-point markers showing the widening spread with increasing quantum number n.

cajal:figure.figure-title: Hermite-Gauss Eigenfunctions as Stacked Comparison Panels
cajal:figure.author: Humanitarians AI Incorporated
